articles.title: Microsoft discovers new lightweight backdoor that steals cryptocurrency
articles.content: Crypto Clipper spreads over USB and communicates over Tor.
articles.titleZh: 微软发现窃取加密货币的新型轻量级后门
articles.contentZh: Crypto Clipper通过USB进行传播，并通过Tor进行通信。

articles.title: Apple patches high-severity eavesdropping vulnerability in Beats Studio Buds
articles.content: The vulnerability, disclosed 12 months ago, affects multiple manufacturers.
articles.titleZh: Apple修补了Beats Studio Buds中的高严重性窃听漏洞
articles.contentZh: 该漏洞于12个月前披露，影响多个制造商。

articles.title: Before SpaceX IPO, investors in China secretly acquired stakes
articles.content: One previously unreported SpaceX investor has ties to Chinese military contractors.
articles.titleZh: SpaceX IPO前，中国投资者秘密收购股权
articles.contentZh: 一位此前未被报道的SpaceX投资者与中国军事承包商有联系。

articles.title: Massive breach spills credentials for thousands of sensitive networks
articles.content: The affected include Oracle, Lenovo, FedEx, a NATO contractor, and Fortinet.
articles.titleZh: 大规模泄露泄露了数千个敏感网络的凭据
articles.contentZh: 受影响的公司包括甲骨文、联想、北约承包商FedEx和Fortinet。

articles.title: Bose thinks it can be a media company for some reason
articles.content: The history books are littered with the corpses of corporate record labels started by companies that had no business being in the music industry. Bose thinks it can be the exception to the rule. It thinks it can be Red Bull. And, while Bose has more of a right to dip its toes into the […]
articles.titleZh: 由于某种原因， Bose认为它可以成为一家媒体公司
articles.contentZh: 历史书中布满了公司唱片公司的尸体，这些唱片公司是由在音乐行业没有业务的公司创立的。Bose认为这可能是规则的例外。它认为它可能是红牛。而且，虽然Bose有更多的权利将其脚趾浸入[…]

articles.title: Cold Court’s debut EP is an infectious, glitchy genre mashup
articles.content: Cold Court is a brother-sister duo from Philly that seems to love nothing more than shoving all of their influences together in a messy soup that at least superficially resembles the hyperpop you've come to expect from acts like 100 Gecs. But, where songs like "Dumbest Girl Alive" goofily wink at pop punk and emo, […]
articles.titleZh: Cold Court的首张EP是一个具有传染性、毛骨悚然的流派混搭
articles.contentZh: Cold Court是一个来自费城的兄弟姐妹二人组，似乎只喜欢将他们所有的影响推到一个凌乱的汤中，至少表面上类似于你从100 Gecs这样的行为中期望的超级流行音乐。但是，像“Dumbest Girl Alive”这样的歌曲在流行朋克和情绪上傻傻地眨眼， […]
